reviews.author: Ashley Chan
reviews.text: We just moved into town and decided to check out Gary’s Grill. The burger and the fried shrimp were piping hot and tasted great. Staff was so nice, they gave us a slice of watermelon on the way out!

reviews.author: will S
reviews.text: Hands down one of the best burgers I’ve ever had! The flavors were on point, and the service was amazing—super friendly and fast. Total hidden gem! I’m definitely coming back and bringing the whole crew next time. If you haven’t been yet, you’re seriously missing out!

reviews.author: Cat
reviews.text: Just stopped by and had one of the best burgers I’ve ever had, the gravy with fried was delicious! Staff is very friendly and professional, service was fast! loved everything about my visit. Excited to keep stopping by!

reviews.author: Amanda Caven
reviews.text: We got onion rings, El Macho Burger and a Double Cheeseburger. Large portion sizes and everything tasted great!

reviews.author: Juan Martinez
reviews.text: I married a local and she raves about Gary’s Grill - when they recently reopened, I finally got a chance to taste for myself what all the fuss was about!

reviews.text: I've been in the West Buda area for nearly 10 years and have never thought of trying this place until recently. These guys are great for quick and easy pizza! Not quite Home Slice levels or anything like that, more on par with Double Daves and much better than your typical delivery pizza. Their make your own pizza rolls are incredible and love the fresh Johnny G's Italian sausage!

reviews.author: Melody Gonzalez
reviews.text: Breakfast sandwiches are a must , packed with amazing flavor and portions are very reasonable. The staff was very warm and welcoming. My daughter and I were off today and wanted to try a new spot for breakfast, It is safe to say we will be trying again 💕

reviews.author: Ray
reviews.text: They were very friendly and welcoming! We tried their new croissant sandwich and the croissant was soft and buttery. I would recommend their seasonal menu pancakes, the pumpkin spice.

reviews.author: Jess
reviews.text: This was the best breakfast sandwich I have ever eaten. It was simple but packed with flavor. And what a lovely food truck and park! It was busy on a Sunday morning, and the guy in front of me was a regular, so I knew it would be good. I was right, and I will be coming back!!

reviews.author: Irene Cruz
reviews.text: Food is excellent. A little bit of a wait but worth it. Serves sandwiches, pancakes, n French toast. Will come back to try the fresh squeeze orange juice.

reviews.author: Jennifer “Jen” Ghormley
reviews.text: I had the most delicious breakfast sandwich on a croissant with awesome cheese pull. My husband had the breakfast bowl with delicious salsa. Everything was amazing and no line or long wait. I highly suggest you try the fresh squeezed oj.

reviews.author: Stephanie A.
reviews.text: Enjoyed their breakfast tacos. The chorizo with potato taco was delicious! Will be my new to go place for breakfast tacos.

reviews.author: Jet Odrerir
reviews.text: A delicious oasis in a food desert! Great, friendly service and super tasty tacos (carnitas & fajitas this time) really made my afternoon. The homemade hot sauces really topped things off!

reviews.author: Garrett
reviews.text: This place was amazing.. I had two tacos - tasty and authentic. The lady at the window was friendly and helpful as well. Definitely a highlight of my trip to Austin for authentic Mexican food.
